meaning: n.剑桥(英国城市,剑桥大学所在地)
examples: He was sent to study in Cambridge University.
London has a much bigger population than Cambridge.
On March 12, 1829, Oxford sent a challenge to Cambridge first.
Cross the river at the Museum of Science and pedal back on the Cambridge side.
Marx, the son of a former Harvard statistics professor, grew up in Cambridge, Mass.
